name: ai-spec

mif.reason: The AI-ready architecture spec is an agent-consumable build artifact rendered to a markdown dialect (frontmatter section-index + EARS acceptance criteria) for a downstream coding agent to execute; the MIF Level-3 source of truth remains the generic report channel plus the architecture-spec genre.

description: Render surviving findings into an AI-ready, agent-executable architecture spec (genre-shaping of the artifact -> markdown pipeline; finding_refs -> evidence sections, goal checks -> EARS criteria, sections -> structure)
